case_title: KIMBERLY CHARMAINE YAMAT CANILAO VS. SUSAN KWAN

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAMAT CANILAO, KIMBERLY CHARMAINE AS TO DEFENDANT KWAN, SUSAN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-08-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-03-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-16-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-21-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-08-2020 CONTINUED TO MAY-20-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100105130)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-21-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-20-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
